name: ai-rules-codex
description: Maintain shared AI assistant rules from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain shared AI assistant rules from Codex.
interface.longDescription: AI Rules Codex helps Codex inspect, consolidate, initialize, and synchronize project AI rules using Ai_Rules.md as the source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Audit this project's AI rule files.
Create Ai_Rules.md and sync my assistants.
